name: Ginger-Soy Drumettes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Garlic Powder and Ground Ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken drumettes in a gallon-size Ziploc storage bag. Mix remaining ingredients in a small bowl; pour over chicken in the bag. Seal the bag and gently shake to coat the chicken with the marinade. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
2. Remove chicken from the bag; reserve the marinade. Grill the chicken over medium-hot coals, or broil 6 inches from the heat source, until the chicken is browned and juices run clear when pierced with a fork (15 to 20 minutes). Turn the chicken halfway through cooking time and brush frequently with sauce. Serve warm.
